items.title: The Chinese box office isn't the Hollywood kingmaker it used to be. Here's why
items.summary: Shifting government content controls and postpandemic Hollywood trends have made China less of a player in the global box office landscape.

items.title: Android’s controversial sideloading changes pushed me to build my own app installer
items.summary: I vibe coded my own app to sidestep Android's upcoming sideloading pain.
